subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the All-Dominant, the Self-Subsisting. God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and that He Who speaketh is verily the Dawning-Place of the Command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لمطلع الامر من
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation
